subcodes.first_line: O Persian friends! Your letter hath been received, and from its heart-entrancing meanings the utmost joy hath been attained. Praise be unto God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران پارسی نامه شما رسید و از معانی دلنشین نهایت سرور حاصل گردید حمد خدا
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @chastisement and requital, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @past, present and future of Iran, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
